response:
```sql
SELECT A.airport_code
FROM airports AS A
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT departure_airport_code AS airport_code FROM flights
    UNION ALL
    SELECT arrival_airport_code AS airport_code FROM flights
) AS FlightCounts ON A.airport_code = FlightCounts.airport_code
GROUP BY A.airport_code
ORDER BY COUNT(FlightCounts.airport_code) ASC
LIMIT 1;
```
